title: Fuchsia encliandra
taxonomy: Fuchsia encliandra is a species of flowering plant in the family Onagraceae. It belongs to the genus Fuchsia, which consists of approximately 106 species of flowering plants. The Onagraceae family is a group of flowering plants that includes watercress, evening primrose, and willow-herbs. Fuchsia encliandra is native to the mountainous regions of China, specifically in the provinces of Yunnan and Sichuan. The plant is an epiphyte, which means it grows on other plants without deriving nutrients from them.
